productDisplayName: Murcia Women Party Clutch Silver Handbags

This bag is a must have for every woman with style and panache for fashion.Made of high quality synthetic leatherOne main magnetic buttoned chamber with a sub-chamber insideMobile case on the insideComfortable handles in fibreBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
